# Deeksha Sharma

> Senior AI Product Manager portfolio, four zero-to-one launches across fintech, climate, and regulated domains.

Deeksha Sharma is a Senior AI Product Manager and engineer who ships zero-to-one products where AI meets real-world complexity. The site includes work case studies, personal AI builds, skills, writing, and contact details.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Introduction, impact stats, and selected work preview.
- [About](/about): Deeksha's story, principles, and background.
- [Projects](/case-studies): Production case studies and personal AI builds.
- [Skills](/skills): Technical skills, product capabilities, and tools.
- [Writing](/writing): Essays and notes on AI product management.
- [Now](/now): What Deeksha is working on right now.
- [Contact](/contact): How to get in touch.

## Case Studies

- [Shipping AI into mortgage operations](/case-studies/real-estate-fintech): Compliance-first AI in a Series D real estate fintech.
- [First-of-kind LLM ESG intelligence](/case-studies/climate-founding-first-employee): Climate tech founding PM role saving 100+ analyst hours a month.

## Optional

- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/deekshasharma-pm): Professional profile and background.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/strategicsages): Code and personal AI builds.
